trigger_condition.note: Smaller accounts ($50k) trigger at 50% equity change; larger accounts ($500k) trigger at 1% equity change

sizing_rule.note: Fixed fractional position sizing using optimal f=0.4 with adjustment frequency inversely proportional to account size. Adjustment threshold scales with account magnitude: smaller accounts rebalance less frequently (50% equity swings), larger accounts rebalance more frequently (1% equity swings). Formula: Adjustment_Frequency = Base_Account_Size / Current_Account_Size.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size based on equity changes using fixed fractional trading, where larger accounts require adjustments at smaller percentage equity changes than smaller accounts
